narrative:
Precinct Cumberland/Spencer (precinct in Guernsey County) has 678 registered voters, with 54.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.3 percentage points.
